positive: A mesmerizing, highly stylized illustration featuring a whimsical deep sea landscape. The main subject is a magnificent, glowing bioluminescent jellyfish suspended in deep ultramarine water. Surrounding it are stylized coral formations in vibrant teal and coral pink, and schools of abstract, glowing fish forming graceful arcs. The overall aesthetic is neo-art nouveau mixed with modern graphic design, emphasizing clean, scalable silhouettes and strong contrasting pops of light against deep shadows. Composition should be perfectly centered and designed for apparel print repeat; highly detailed, volumetric lighting emanating only from the glowing life forms, deep space/underwater feel, high contrast, vector graphic quality, perfect for screen printing, solid black lines are optional accents.
